redis-specific.label: Redis-Specific Internals
redis-specific.description: Tests that exercise Redis-internal implementation details (allocator, object encoding, event loop) that don't apply to FrogDB's architecture.

intentional-incompatibility:observabilit.label: Observability Differences
intentional-incompatibility:observabilit.description: Tests for Redis-specific INFO fields, stats, or monitoring behavior that FrogDB reports differently or doesn't expose.

intentional-incompatibility:encoding.label: Encoding Differences
intentional-incompatibility:encoding.description: Tests that assert specific internal encoding types (ziplist, listpack, intset) which FrogDB does not use.

intentional-incompatibility:config.label: Configuration Differences
intentional-incompatibility:config.description: Tests relying on Redis-specific configuration mechanisms (redis.conf, ACL files, CONFIG REWRITE) that FrogDB replaces with TOML config.

tested-elsewhere.label: Tested Elsewhere
tested-elsewhere.description: Functionality covered by other FrogDB tests (fuzz tests, integration tests, or different regression suites).

intentional-incompatibility:replication.label: Replication Differences
intentional-incompatibility:replication.description: Tests for Redis replication internals (SLAVEOF, replica propagation) that differ in FrogDB's Raft-based replication.

intentional-incompatibility:memory.label: Memory Management
intentional-incompatibility:memory.description: Tests for Redis-specific memory management (MEMORY USAGE internals, jemalloc stats, maxmemory policies).

intentional-incompatibility:protocol.label: Protocol Differences
intentional-incompatibility:protocol.description: Tests for RESP3/HELLO protocol negotiation or protocol-level behaviors that FrogDB handles differently.

intentional-incompatibility:persistence.label: Persistence Differences
intentional-incompatibility:persistence.description: Tests for RDB/AOF persistence mechanisms that FrogDB replaces with RocksDB-backed storage.

intentional-incompatibility:cluster.label: Cluster Differences
intentional-incompatibility:cluster.description: Tests for Redis Cluster gossip-protocol internals that differ in FrogDB's Raft-based clustering.

intentional-incompatibility:debug.label: DEBUG Command
intentional-incompatibility:debug.description: Tests requiring the Redis DEBUG command, which is not exposed in FrogDB.

intentional-incompatibility:single-db.label: Single Database
intentional-incompatibility:single-db.description: Tests requiring SELECT/multi-DB support, which FrogDB intentionally limits to a single database.

intentional-incompatibility:scripting.label: Scripting Differences
intentional-incompatibility:scripting.description: Tests for Redis Lua 5.1 scripting quirks or redis.* API details that differ in FrogDB's Lua 5.4 environment.

intentional-incompatibility:cli.label: CLI Differences
intentional-incompatibility:cli.description: Tests requiring the redis-cli binary or CLI-specific features.
